title: 5 Stocks With Robust Sales Growth to Counter Volatile Markets
text: Solid sales growth is vital to gauge a company's health and ability to sustain its business. Let's take a look at Methanex (MEOH), Carlisle (CSL), Huntington Ingalls (HII), Cheniere Energy (LNG) and Vistra (VST), which are posting top-line growth.

title: Will Defensive Sectors Shine in the Extremely Volatile 2022?
text: We have narrowed our search to five defensive stocks. These are: GWRS, VST, AMN, ADM, PPC.

title: Find Strong Stocks to Buy for June and Beyond with this ROE Screen
text: Investors with long-term outlooks might consider buying strong stocks of companies with a record of turning assets into profits heading into June and beyond.

title: Recent Price Trend in Vistra Corp. (VST) is Your Friend, Here's Why
text: If you are looking for stocks that are well positioned to maintain their recent uptrend, Vistra Corp. (VST) could be a great choice. It is one of the several stocks that passed through our "Recent Price Strength" screen.

title: Vistra Stock: Free Cash Flow Yield Is Not What It Seems
text: Vistra management loves to tout the stock's impressive free cash flow yield. Management is pouring as much of its cash as possible into buying back VST stock.

title: Wall Street Lacking Trigger to Rebound: Top 5 Safe Picks
text: We have narrowed our search to five low-beta stocks with a solid dividend yield. These are: CHRW, VST, PKG, WSO and AEE.

title: Top 5 Picks to Boost Portfolio Amid Wall Street's Free Fall
text: We have narrowed our search to five utility stocks with strong potential for 2022. These are: WTRG, NFG, AEE, SWX and VST.

title: Vistra Corp. (VST) CEO Curt Morgan on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 6, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Meagan Horn - Vice President of Investor Relations Curt Morgan - Chief Executive Officer Jim Burke - President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Jonathan Arnold - Vertical Research Partners Durgesh Chopra - Evercore James Thalacker - BMO Capital Operator Good morning and welcome to Vistra's Investor Webcast discussing First Quarter 2022 Results. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Reports Q1 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -126.09% and 15.72%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
